content: The intrinsic reward bonuses that power curiosity-driven methods like ICM and RND can be repurposed as a dynamic pruning signal for 2024–2025 SOTA active learning agent memory, where only surprising, unpredicted transitions (the same events that trigger high intrinsic curiosity reward) are retained in long-term episodic memory. This creates a self-selecting memory archive that prioritizes information that will improve the agent’s future exploration, eliminating redundant, easily predictable experience that wastes storage and slows planning.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
